column1: Look at the tree! It looks really___________and lovely. (PEACEFUL)
Muscles get_________and____________if they are used a lot. That's why____________practise_________. (BIG/STRONG/SPORTSMAN/HARD)
Children. there is some salad in the fridge. Help___________ . (YOU)
Mrs Smith will be one___________years old next month. (HUNDRED)
We will be very happy to visit Mrs Smith on her one______________birthday. (HUNDRED)
The Smiths have got a lot of__________in the garden. (LILY)
